subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This leaf from among Thy leaves hath clung to the Sidrah of Thy grace and hath departed from her homeland, advancing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی هذه ورقه من اوراقک قد تمسکت بسدره فضلک و خرجت من وطنها مقبله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
